assignment_description:
⍞ Materials: Grade 4 Student packet of copywork and dictation passages

➜ STUDY & WRITE
Work on a complete dictation lesson (10 min. of study, 5 minutes for passage to be dictated). You can use this week's suggested passage or choose your own of a similar length. Be sure to pay attention to any added notes in the student dictation packet for the week. Only choose enough text so the student learns 4-5 new words at a time.

➜ STUDY & WRITE
Work on a complete dictation lesson (10 min. of study, 5 minutes for passage to be dictated). You can use this week's suggested passage or choose your own of a similar length. Be sure to pay attention to any added notes in the student dictation packet for the week. Only choose enough text so the student learns 4-5 new words at a time.
